elements.name: User is informed about the maximum username length

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks on the ADD button to add a new user
the user enters more than 40 characters into the username field
the user sees a validation message for the username field

elements.name: password field enforces security strength of password

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks on the ADD button to add a new user
the user enters weak password into password field
a message appears stating weak

elements.name: Status field(Active/Inactive) is NOT selected by default

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks on the ADD button to add a new user
the Status field should be set to select by default
I login as an admin
the user clicks the Trash Can delete icon on the third record in the Records Found list
the user confirms the deletion in the Are you Sure? modal
the user no longer sees that record in the Records Found list

elements.name: Impossible for Admin to Self-Delete their account

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks the Trash Can delete icon of username Admin
the page should not display the confirmation modal with the message Are you Sure?

elements.name: The user successfully cancels user deletion

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks the Trash Can delete icon on the third record in the Records Found list
the user cancels the deletion in the Are you Sure? modal
the user still sees that record in the Records Found list
I login as an admin
the user clicks on the checkboxes for the first 3 records under Records Found
the user clicks Delete Selected button
the user confirms the deletion in the Are you Sure? modal
the user no longer sees those records

elements.name: Admin sees validation messages when creating a user with empty required fields

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks on the ADD button to add a new user
the user clicks the Save button without filling out any fields
the user sees validation messages for all required fields

elements.name: Admin cancels user creation and returns to User Management page

steps.name: I login as an admin
the user clicks on the ADD button to add a new user
the user clicks the Cancel button
the user should be navigated back to the User Management page

elements.name: User stays logged-in after Logging-in & closing tab & reopening the application

steps.name: I login as an admin
I close the browser tab
I reopen the application
I should be logged in and see the dashboard page with the title Dashboard

elements.name: Username is seen in field after input

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click on the username field
I type into the username field
the username field should contain the username

elements.name: Login with valid credentials as Admin

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click on the username field
I type into the username field
I click on the password field
I type into the password field
i click on the login button
I should be logged in and see the dashboard page with the title Dashboard

elements.name: User attempts to login with Invalid Credentials

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
the user types non-existent username into the username field
the user types non-existent password into the password field
i click on the login button
I should see a validation message saying Invalid credentials

elements.name: Verify validation messages with no password credentials

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click on the username field
I type into the username field
i click on the login button
I should see a validation message saying Required

elements.name: Verify validation messages with no username credentials

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click on the password field
I type into the password field
i click on the login button
I should see a validation message saying Required

elements.name: Verify validation messages for empty login fields

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
i click on the login button
I should see a validation message saying Required

elements.name: Password reset modal shows up properly

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click the Forget your password? link
i should see a modal to reset password

elements.name: Password field should mask the input

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I click on the password field
I type into the password field
the password field should mask the input with dots or asterisks

elements.name: Test the Login Page is Displayed

steps.name: I navigate to the login page
the login page should be displayed
